version_description: This was made by watching Luke Bryan play One Margarita. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dF_TIRFK4sA.
tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.version_description: Arranged for Guitar, also includes vocals.

content:
Capo 7th fret
[Intro]    Dsus6    Dsu6     G    x4

[Verse 1]
Dsus5
Everybody here ain't from here
     Dsus5                        G
But we're here doin' our thing
Dsus5
Lettin' go a little, little by little
 Dsus5                       G
Sippin' on a frozen drink

[Pre-Chorus]
Dsus5
Tiki bars tik'n, pourin' all weekend
 Dsus5                          G
Clouds ain't leakin' no rain
Dsus5
Two pieces a-shakin', white caps a-breakin'
Dsus5
We ain't feelin' no pain, it goes like

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                                   [ch]G[/ch]
One margarita, two margarita, three margarita, shot[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
Don't worry 'bout tomorrow[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                                   [ch]G[/ch]
Leave all your sorrow out here on the floatin' dock[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
   When that sun lays down, we'll be on our way[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
   One more barefoot round, one more last chance to say[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                       [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Hey Señorita, don't you think we need a salt and a Buffett song?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
One margarita, two margarita, three margarita, we'll be gone[/tab]

[Instrumental]    Dsus6      Dsus6     G

[Verse 2]
Dsus5
Ice blue skies, shades on the eyes
   Dsus5                    G
To tuck the bloodshot away
Dsus5
Hair of the dog, shouldn't take long
     Dsus5                    G
But who cares, we got all day
Dsus5
Palm trees a-leanin', sunburn a-screamin'
     Dsus5
But we'll all be alright, after

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                                   [ch]G[/ch]
One margarita, two margarita, three margarita, shot[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
Don't worry 'bout tomorrow[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                                   [ch]G[/ch]
Leave all your sorrow out here on the floatin' dock[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
   When that sun lays down, we'll be on our way[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
   One more barefoot round, one more last chance to say[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                       [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Hey Señorita, don't you think we need a salt and a Marley song?[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
One margarita, two margarita, three margarita, we'll be gone[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
            We'll be gone[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
Dsus5
Tiki bars tik'n, pourin' all weekend
 Dsus5
Clouds ain't leakin' no rain
Dsus5
Two pieces a-shakin', white caps a-breakin'
Dsus5                         N.C.
We ain't feelin' no pain, it goes like
